prose.en: Assessors MUST supply the provider with an overall summary of the verification and validation assessment results, including any resulting failures or areas of dispute; this summary will be included by the provider in the FedRAMP Certification Package Overview for the cloud service offering.

https://ns.fedramp.gov/cr26/facet/narrat.note: FedRAMP does not supply a template for this summary and encourages independent assessment services to optimize for the best customer experience in the creation of these materials.
